hero.title: About Toko Trading
hero.subtitle: As one of Turkey's leading international trade companies, we have been providing trusted solutions worldwide for over 20 years.

overview.heading: Our Story
overview.p1: Toko Trading was established in 2003 in Istanbul as a company specializing in international trade. Since our founding, we have been working with the vision of being a reliable trade bridge between Turkey and the world.
overview.p2: Throughout our 20+ years of experience, we have carried out thousands of successful trade operations in food, textile, machinery, chemicals, and many other sectors. Thanks to our strong business partnerships in over 50 countries, we offer our clients the most suitable solutions.
overview.p3: Our team consists of experienced professionals who provide professional support at every stage of international trade. We serve a wide range of areas from customs procedures to logistics management, from market research to quality control.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become a leading trade platform connecting our clients to global markets by leveraging Turkey's strategic position in international trade. We aim to shape the future of the industry by integrating technology and innovation into our business processes.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To help our clients grow their businesses by managing their international trade processes transparently, reliably, and efficiently. To build long-term business partnerships by applying the highest quality standards in every project.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: Core principles that shape our business approach

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: We stand behind every commitment and deliver on our promises on time and in full. Our clients' trust in us is our greatest asset.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: We maintain open and transparent communication throughout all our business processes. Our clients are informed and involved at every stage.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We closely follow industry developments, continuously improve our processes, and offer our clients the most modern solutions available.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: We work with our clients not just as a service provider but as a long-term strategic partner, viewing their success as our own.

cta.title: Ready to Partner With Us?
cta.description: Contact us today for your international trade needs. Let us create solutions tailored to your business.

hero.title: Our Services
hero.subtitle: We provide comprehensive and professional solutions in import, export, sourcing, and transit trade. Grow your business with our experienced team supporting you at every step.

import.title: Import Services
import.description: Comprehensive import solutions for raw material and product sourcing from around the world. We professionally manage the entire process from customs procedures to logistics management, cost analysis to quality control.

features.qualityControl: Product quality control and inspection services

export.title: Export Services
export.description: Expert solutions for product and raw material export from Turkey to global markets. We manage all your export processes from target market research to buyer matching, documentation to logistics coordination.

features.documentation: Export documentation and letter of credit management

sourcing.title: Sourcing Solutions
sourcing.description: We source products at the best price and quality for your business through our global supply network. We provide support at every stage from supplier auditing to price negotiation, sample management to supply chain optimization.

features.priceNegotiation: Competitive price negotiation and cost analysis
features.sampleManagement: Sample management and product development support
features.supplyChain: Supply chain optimization and risk management

transit-trade.title: Transit Trade
transit-trade.description: Transit trade operations from Turkey to third countries. With our specialized solutions for Russia and CIS countries, we simplify complex trade routes and make them more efficient.

features.cisExpertise: Deep expertise in Russia and CIS markets

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Our Services?
whyChoose.subtitle: We empower your business with the values that make the difference in international trade

endToEnd.title: End-to-End Support
endToEnd.description: We provide professional guidance at every stage of the trade process. A team by your side from first contact through post-delivery.

expertise.title: Industry Expertise
expertise.description: With over 20 years of experience, we understand the dynamics of various industries. We create tailored solutions for each sector.

network.title: Global Network
network.description: We facilitate your global trade through strong business partnerships and supply chains established in over 50 countries.

cta.title: Need a Custom Trade Solution?
cta.description: Talk to our expert team about import, export, and sourcing solutions tailored to your business. First consultation is free.

hero.title: Industry Sectors
hero.subtitle: Specialized sourcing and trade solutions across 8+ diverse industries. We understand the unique demands of each sector and deliver tailored procurement strategies.

machinery.title: Machinery & Equipment
machinery.description: Industrial equipment, agricultural machinery, construction equipment, and packaging machines.

chemicals.title: Chemicals & Petrochemicals
chemicals.description: Industrial chemicals, agricultural chemicals, cosmetic ingredients, and cleaning products.

construction.title: Construction Materials
construction.description: Steel, rebar, cement, ceramics, tiles, and plumbing fittings for building projects worldwide.

raw-materials.title: Raw Materials
raw-materials.description: Metals, alloys, minerals, polymers, plastics, and timber from trusted global sources.

electronics.title: Electronics & Technology
electronics.description: Electronic components, consumer electronics, industrial electronics, and telecom equipment.

automotive.title: Automotive & Parts
automotive.description: Auto parts, spares, accessories, tires, and automotive fluids for the global aftermarket.

t1.quote: Working with Toko Trading completely transformed our sourcing processes from Turkey. Their expertise in customs procedures and on-time delivery performance is unmatched.

t2.quote: Toko's knowledge of CIS markets in our transit trade operations is invaluable. They manage complex logistics processes seamlessly.

t3.quote: We have been working with Toko for over 5 years. Thanks to their transparency and reliability, we have confidently expanded into new markets.
